title: Fundraising Strategy Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger fundraising strategy foundations judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Fundraising Strategy Foundations is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Fundraising Strategy Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good fundraising strategy foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Fundraising Strategy Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
